title: Zhengzhou, Henan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zhengzhou, Henan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zhengzhou is a city in Henan with a population of 12,600,000. A major transportation hub in central China, known as the ‘Railway City’ and a growing center for logistics and manufacturing.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
